evidence_summary: The scene focuses on the isolation of john_carter following a crash, emphasizing his struggle to navigate a damaged machine over a desolate landscape. Production must manage a significant time jump through lighting shifts and maintain the visual integrity o...

After the crash, Carter is left flying a damaged machine without navigation tools. He spends six hours flying over the desolate dead sea bottom, realizing he is lost as the cities he passes do not match the architecture of Helium.
Wide, lonely shots of the machine against a vast landscape
POV looking down at the desolate sea bottom and distant cities
